The first element of preorder is always the root of the (sub)tree.
Find the root's position in inorder. Elements to its LEFT in inorder are in the LEFT subtree, elements to its RIGHT are in the RIGHT subtree.
Use a HashMap to store index positions in the inorder array for O(1) lookup.
Recursively build the left subtree using the left portion of inorder and the appropriate portion of preorder, and similarly for the right subtree.
